'''âsh-b-t''' ('''kashabat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:helicopt|helicopt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:helicopt|helicopt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-b-t
|-
! Lemma
| kashabat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishabat|thishabat]] || [[word:jishabat|jishabat]] || [[word:shishabat|shishabat]] || [[word:kishabat|kishabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushabat|thuthushabat]] || [[word:jujushabat|jujushabat]] || [[word:shushushabat|shushushabat]] || [[word:kukushabat|kukushabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushabat|thushabat]] || [[word:jushabat|jushabat]] || [[word:shushabat|shushabat]] || [[word:kushabat|kushabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushabat|thushabat]] || [[word:jushabat|jushabat]] || [[word:shushabat|shushabat]] || [[word:kushabat|kushabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshabat|theshabat]] || [[word:jeshabat|jeshabat]] || [[word:sheshabat|sheshabat]] || [[word:keshabat|keshabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshabat|thothoshabat]] || [[word:jojoshabat|jojoshabat]] || [[word:shoshoshabat|shoshoshabat]] || [[word:kokoshabat|kokoshabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshabat|thoshabat]] || [[word:joshabat|joshabat]] || [[word:shoshabat|shoshabat]] || [[word:koshabat|koshabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshabat|thoshabat]] || [[word:joshabat|joshabat]] || [[word:shoshabat|shoshabat]] || [[word:koshabat|koshabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshabat|thĂŠshabat]] || [[word:jĂŠshabat|jĂŠshabat]] || [[word:shĂŠshabat|shĂŠshabat]] || [[word:kĂŠshabat|kĂŠshabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashabat|thathashabat]] || [[word:jajashabat|jajashabat]] || [[word:shashashabat|shashashabat]] || [[word:kakashabat|kakashabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashabat|thashabat]] || [[word:jashabat|jashabat]] || [[word:shashabat|shashabat]] || [[word:kashabat|kashabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashabat|thashabat]] || [[word:jashabat|jashabat]] || [[word:shashabat|shashabat]] || [[word:kashabat|kashabat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashabat|shashabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashabat|goshashabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashabat|gokishashabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashabatnĂŒ|shashabatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashabatnknĂŒ|goshashabatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabatnĂŒ|gokishashabatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashabatshĂ«|shashabatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashabatnkshĂ«|goshashabatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashabatshĂ«|gokishashabatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabatro|shashabatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabatnkro|goshashabatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabatro|gokishashabatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabatmu|shashabatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabatnkmu|goshashabatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabatmu|gokishashabatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashabatsher|shashabatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashabatnksher|goshashabatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashabatsher|gokishashabatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashabatng|shashabatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashabatnkng|goshashabatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashabatng|gokishashabatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashabatya|shashabatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashabatnkya|goshashabatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashabatya|gokishashabatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashabatyam|shashabatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashabatnkyam|goshashabatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashabatyam|gokishashabatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabatnĂŒshĂ«|shashabatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashabatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashabatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabatnĂŒro|shashabatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabatnknĂŒro|goshashabatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabatnĂŒro|gokishashabatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabatnĂŒmu|shashabatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabatnknĂŒmu|goshashabatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabatnĂŒmu|gokishashabatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabatshĂ«nĂŒ|shashabatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashabatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashabatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabatshĂ«ro|shashabatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabatnkshĂ«ro|goshashabatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabatshĂ«ro|gokishashabatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabatshĂ«mu|shashabatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabatnkshĂ«mu|goshashabatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabatshĂ«mu|gokishashabatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabatronĂŒ|shashabatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabatnkronĂŒ|goshashabatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabatronĂŒ|gokishashabatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabatroshĂ«|shashabatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabatnkroshĂ«|goshashabatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabatroshĂ«|gokishashabatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabatromu|shashabatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabatnkromu|goshashabatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabatromu|gokishashabatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabatmunĂŒ|shashabatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabatnkmunĂŒ|goshashabatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabatmunĂŒ|gokishashabatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabatmushĂ«|shashabatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabatnkmushĂ«|goshashabatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabatmushĂ«|gokishashabatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabatmuro|shashabatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabatnkmuro|goshashabatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabatmuro|gokishashabatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
